conversation_log.summary: Rewrote all six original acceptance criteria. The previous criteria were vague ('fully functional', 'integrates', 'extensible without structural changes') and not binary/observable. Revised criteria now specify: exact file paths to delete/create, exact i18n config keys to check, MUI Select component (not toggle), country-flag-icons usage with specific country codes (GB, SE), single iterable data structure for language list (no per-language branches), and a required Vitest unit test covering render and changeLanguage invocation. Added Goal, Background, Out of Scope, Files Likely to Change, and Dependencies sections. Restarting Architect + Tester sign-off.

All nine acceptance criteria are architecturally consistent. MUI Select/MenuItem aligns with ADR-008, country-flag-icons usage aligns with ADR-009, co-located Vitest test aligns with ADR-011, i18n and locale file structure aligns with frontend.md conventions. Constraint noted: LanguageSelector.tsx must use PascalCase, test file must be co-located as LanguageSelector.test.tsx.

All 9 acceptance criteria are binary, specific, observable, and within scope. Criterion 1: filesystem deletion check. Criterion 2: text search in i18n.ts. Criterion 3: file existence + top-level key-set equality against en/common.json. Criterion 4: config property inspection in i18n.ts. Criterion 5: component-tree check for MUI Select presence and toggle absence. Criterion 6: render assertion for MenuItem count and correct country-flag-icons SVG components (GB/SE) from exact import path. Criterion 7: mock call assertion for i18n.changeLanguage with correct locale string, verified by criterion 9 test. Criterion 8: structural code check for single iterable data structure, no per-language if/else or JSX branches. Criterion 9: specific new Vitest test (not a generic 'tests pass' criterion) covering render count and changeLanguage invocation. No criteria are vague, subjective, or redundant with CI enforcement.
Beginning implementation of task #78. Creating branch task/78-swedish-language-dropdown.

decisions.approach: Create src/lib/i18n.ts as the new canonical i18n config (en + sv, no fr). Update layout/LanguageSelector.tsx to use MUI Select with i18n.changeLanguage. Create sv/common.json locale. Add co-located LanguageSelector.test.tsx. Update language-selector/locale-flag-map.ts to include sv:SE.
risks: The existing i18n.ts at src/i18n/i18n.ts still imports fr.json — need to update it to use sv instead, and create src/lib/i18n.ts as the criteria reference point.
Task 47 acceptance test (AC8) checks locale-flag-map.ts entries match locale directories — must update locale-flag-map.ts to add sv:SE when sv/common.json is created.
layout/LanguageSelector.tsx currently uses i18n from useTranslation hook — new version must call i18n.changeLanguage directly.
